Index JUIT Waknaghat Search Login Register x Home About Us About us Message from Management Message from Faculty In-Charge Present Team Past Team Code of Ethics Alumni Services Member Benefits Request Forms Distinguished Alumni Alumni Achievements Alumni Awards Directory News and Updates News & Updates Alumni Stories Events Upcoming Events Past Events Gallery Albums Videos Engage Jobs/Internships Scholarship Contact Us Event Details Home Events Upcoming Events Alumni Talk by Captain Shivam Garg Go Back Apr, 11 2022 at 10:00 am Alumni Talk by Captain Shivam Garg JUIT Alumni Cell invites you to an Alumni Talk by Capt . Shivam Garg. He is an alumnus of the 2015 batch. He appeared in CDSE in 2014 and joined IMA in 2015. He passed out as a commissioned officer in Dec 2016. Presently He is serving as a peacekeeper working for the United Nations in a mission named MONUSCO in the Democratic Republic of Congo. Capt . Shivam has been commended by the Chief of Army Staff for a gallant operation in Jammu and Kashmir along the Line of Control. He'll be speaking on "Life Lessons from the Army." About Us All who hail from the JUIT have set out on their own incredible journeys, building a life of success and enriching experiences.
